scripts.test:unit: tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && node .test-dist/tests/editorAttachments.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/webdavRequest.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/webdavChanges.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/conflictResolution.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/syncIntegrity.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/pendingQueueSummary.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/localAttachments.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/attachmentUrls.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/localImportExport.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/legacyMigration.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/markdownArchive.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/remoteDeleteConflictFlow.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/webdavSnapshot.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/webdavProtocol.spec.js && node .test-dist/tests/webdavLocalServer.spec.js
scripts.sync:android: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
